form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after two months 3rd of 8 at Townsville Mdn on March 15 over 1000m, slow going 0.5 len behind Parppy 'N' Me carrying 58kg at $21. Previously second-up 6th of 9 at Moruya Ctry Mdn on January 5 over 1010m, 8 len behind Shezain with 56kg at $61. Well in the mix.

form.formComment: Resuming today after a break of 12 weeks.
